alternative_setup_policy.pass_rule: the low-margin source-current support setup must keep substantive ordered trace legs, response-caused access/path/pressure change, later support dependence on the modified resource state, target-band membership, support-floor preservation, budget validity, and claim-boundary controls under its own frozen challenge envelope

checks.detail: all unsafe claim flags remain false
7-B supports an alternative local G5 setup only; final closeout remains pending

comparison_to_iteration_7a.interpretation: 7-A tests the high-margin fixed I7 route_b row; 7-B tests a separate low-margin support-state bridge. 7-B has a narrower envelope but improves generality by showing another setup can reach local G5 without changing claim ceiling.
